caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" on the front, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and wears a gold chain around his neck. The background features a white wall with repetitive logos and text, including "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". A logo for "PODCAST" is visible on the left side of the screen, and "BOSS TALK 101" is displayed on the right. The man is speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth as he looks toward someone off-camera to his right. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, and the scene stays static except for the slight movements of his facial expressions and head as he continues to talk.
